cards.description: Disposable Desktop sidecar live test card from test_folder

cards.name: dh-card-base
cards.description: Personal base card bundling the 12 current-lane Darwinian Harness skills.

cards.name: live-context
cards.description: Personal context assistant card. Encodes meeting recordings into corrected, speaker-mapped transcripts, organizes them in a dated memory folder with persistent conventions, and connects workspace apps such as Notion and Slack with the discipline to write into them safely.

cards.name: math-research-helper
cards.description: Mathematical research rigor toolkit — anchors problems against known results, audits proofs step-by-step, stress-tests claims against edge cases, locates core difficulty, and guards against fabricated rigor in write-ups. Includes search MCPs for literature lookup.
